name: California Farm Bureau Federation
profile_path: content/Donors & Power Networks/Agriculture/California Farm Bureau Federation.md

signals.body_snippet: The California Farm Bureau Federation (CFBF) is the statewide membership organization for California farmers and ranchers — the largest such organization in the state, with roughly 30,000 member families. Unlike Western Growers (which represents primarily large commercial operations), the Farm Bureau has a broader membership that includes smaller family farms alongside corporate agricultural operations. In practice, its political positions are aligned with large agricultural employer interests.
